# anthropic_claude_code_usage_report (Data Source)

Fetches per-day Claude Code usage metrics from the Admin API. `starting_at` is a single date (YYYY-MM-DD) — the response covers only that day. Polymorphic actor is flattened: exactly one of `actor_email` (user) or `actor_api_key_name` (api) is set, indicated by `actor_type`.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "anthropic_claude_code_usage_report" "yesterday" {
  starting_at = formatdate("YYYY-MM-DD", timeadd(timestamp(), "-24h"))
}

output "sessions_by_user" {
  value = {
    for e in data.anthropic_claude_code_usage_report.yesterday.entries :
    coalesce(e.actor_email, e.actor_api_key_name) => e.core_metrics.num_sessions
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `starting_at` (String) YYYY-MM-DD date.

### Optional

- `limit` (Number)
- `page` (String)

### Read-Only

- `entries` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entries))
- `has_more` (Boolean)
- `next_page` (String)

<a id="nestedatt--entries"></a>
### Nested Schema for `entries`

Read-Only:

- `actor_api_key_name` (String)
- `actor_email` (String)
- `actor_type` (String)
- `core_metrics` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entries--core_metrics))
- `customer_type` (String)
- `date` (String)
- `model_breakdown` (Attributes List) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entries--model_breakdown))
- `organization_id` (String)
- `subscription_type` (String)
- `terminal_type` (String)
- `tool_actions` (Attributes Map) Tool-name to acceptance counts. Keys observed include edit_tool, multi_edit_tool, notebook_edit_tool, write_tool. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entries--tool_actions))

<a id="nestedatt--entries--core_metrics"></a>
### Nested Schema for `entries.core_metrics`

Read-Only:

- `commits_by_claude_code` (Number)
- `lines_of_code` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--entries--core_metrics--lines_of_code))
- `num_sessions` (Number)
- `pull_requests_by_claude_code` (Number)

<a id="nestedatt--entries--core_metrics--lines_of_code"></a>
### Nested Schema for `entries.core_metrics.lines_of_code`

Read-Only:

- `added` (Number)
- `removed` (Number)



<a id="nestedatt--entries--model_breakdown"></a>
### Nested Schema for `entries.model_breakdown`

Read-Only:

- `cache_creation_tokens` (Number)
- `cache_read_tokens` (Number)
- `estimated_amount` (Number) Cost in minor units (cents for USD).
- `estimated_currency` (String)
- `input_tokens` (Number)
- `model` (String)
- `output_tokens` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--entries--tool_actions"></a>
### Nested Schema for `entries.tool_actions`

Read-Only:

- `accepted` (Number)
- `rejected` (Number)
